generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor-mounted position encoder providing high-resolution feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox for backlash reduction"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Motor current (I_M) time series data streamed via MQTT"
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Motor position (r_M) time series data streamed via MQTT"
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
    base:desc "Gearbox position data streamed via MQTT"
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current data trace (I_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionLossAnalysisService
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor position data trace (r_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionLossAnalysisService
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox position data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionLossAnalysisService
]

instance RobotAxisStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML-based structural model of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBD
]

instance FrictionLossModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model for first axis analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance RFLP : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for hierarchical abstraction across requirements, functions, logic, and physics layers"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelAbstractionService
]

instance OOSEM : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for system complexity management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelAbstractionService
]

instance SPES : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for system complexity management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelAbstractionService
]

instance SMArDT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for system complexity management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelAbstractionService
]

instance ACME : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component and interface modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComponentModelingService
]

instance AADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component and interface modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComponentModelingService
]

instance MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc ADL for component and interface modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComponentModelingService
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML IBD for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComponentModelingService
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavior modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehaviorModelingService
]

instance SysMLStateMachine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machines for behavior modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehaviorModelingService
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation and model execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossAnalysisService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for detailed system behavior implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance Java : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java for detailed system behavior implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance TwinningProcess : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Four-step twinning process: Problem identification, Asset and model analysis, Use or creation of calculations or models, Data identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelEvolutionService
]

instance ModelAbstractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Hierarchical abstraction of requirements, functions, logic, and physics layers"
    DTDFVocab:provides AbstractionInsight
]

instance ComponentModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modeling components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComponentModelInsight
]

instance BehaviorModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Behavior modeling using state machines and automata"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehaviorModelInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of system behavior using Simulink and programming languages"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance FrictionLossAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of friction loss relations in robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for live data linking"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalEfficiencyInsight
]

instance FrictionModelEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous improvement of white-box and black-box friction models during operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeRefinementInsight
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into friction loss relations in robot's first axis"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making accuracy and operational efficiency through dashboard visualization"
]

instance RealTimeRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time model refinement for enhanced accuracy"
]

instance AbstractionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Hierarchical abstraction insight across layers"
]

instance ComponentModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Component and interface modeling insight"
]

instance BehaviorModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Behavior modeling insight"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation insight for system behavior"
]

instance MABIRobotSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes, comprising permanent magnet synchronous motors, gear transmissions, and cycloidal gears"
]

instance FirstAxisMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis, controlled via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl"
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Manufacturing environment for precise motion control and high accuracy"
    base:contains MABIRobotSystem
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses a development phase utilizing Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) with SysML modeling across abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer) and methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), transitioning to an operational phase where continuous model updates occur based on real-time data from physical assets like robot axes during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Uncertainty sources include joint friction, load variations, and temperature effects; validation via comparison of simulated data against measured data to quantify deviations, with sensor arrangements reducing positional uncertainty and backlash."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT communication protocol with publish-subscribe topology for data streaming between physical and digital components."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Sensor data is streamed via MQTT protocol, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) are implemented for system integration."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The system includes a physical safety cell that restricts the maximum working range to ensure safe operation."
]
